info.title: Senior App API
info.description: OpenAPI spec generated from backend routes

password.description: User password that meets security requirements

accessToken.description: JWT access token returned after successful login

email.description: The email address associated with the account

token.description: The password reset token received by email or from the reset flow

newPassword.description: The new password for the account

code.description: OAuth authorization code returned by GitHub after user consent

jiraAccountId.description: JIRA Cloud accountId. Pass empty string to unlink.

jiraProjectKey.description: Jira project key for the team

jiraEmail.description: Email associated with the Jira API token

githubRepositoryId.description: GitHub repository ID in owner/repo format

githubToken.description: GitHub Personal Access Token (PAT) with read:repo access. Required for branch/PR verification.

jiraBoardId.description: Numeric JIRA board id. When set, the system uses /rest/agile/1.0/board/{boardId}/sprint?state=active to resolve the team's active sprint instead of JQL search.

groupId.description: Cohort/group id this team belongs to. Required for the auto-finalize cron to compute per-student points without manual coordinator action.

jiraStoryPointsField.description: Custom field id Jira uses for Story Points on this team's instance. Defaults to customfield_10016 (Jira Cloud default).

gradedBy.description: Must not be provided by client. It is extracted from JWT.

studentId.description: Student identifier for the stored final grade

groupId.description: Group identifier associated with this grade

finalGrade.description: Stored individual final grade for the student

calculatedAt.description: Timestamp when the final grade was calculated

groupId.description: Group identifier for the stored final grade

teamGrade.description: Stored final team grade from D4

individualGrades.description: Individual stored grades for students in the group

calculatedAt.description: Timestamp when this final grade was calculated

data.description: Grade history entries for the requested group page

total.description: Total number of grade history entries

rawGrade.description: Raw numeric grade from committee evaluation (100/80/60/50/0)

teamScalar.description: Team scalar [0–1]: average of all sprint evaluation scores for sprints mapped to this deliverable, divided by 100

deliverablePercentage.description: Contribution percentage of this deliverable toward the final grade (0–100)

teamGrade.description: Sum of all scaled deliverable grades, capped at 100

teamScalar.description: Overall team scalar: average of per-deliverable scalars

scaledDeliverableGrades.description: Breakdown of scaled grades per deliverable

triggeredBy.description: userId of the coordinator who triggered the calculation

force.description: When false (default), returns 409 if a final grade already exists. When true, recalculates and overwrites D4; a new snapshot is always appended to D5.

deliverablePercentage.description: Contribution percentage toward the final grade (0–100)
Contribution percentage toward the final grade (0–100). Must not cause the total across all deliverables to exceed 100.
Updated contribution percentage toward the final grade (0–100). Total across all deliverables must not exceed 100.

actorName.description: Resolved from User.name when actorUserId is set

actorEmail.description: Resolved from User.email when actorUserId is set

leaderUserId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the group leader user

accept.description: true = accept the invite, false = reject it

invitedUserEmail.description: Email of the student to invite

memberUserId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the user to add to the group

assignedAt.description: Timestamp when this group was assigned

assignedByUserId.description: ID of the user who made this assignment

averageGrade.description: Numeric average across all member grades (A=4, B=3, C=2, D=1, F=0)

assignedAt.description: Timestamp when this advisor was assigned

total.description: Total number of advisor assignments for this committee

groupName.description: Display name of the group (joined from Group collection).

assignedAt.description: Timestamp when this group was assigned

assignedByUserId.description: ID of the user who made this assignment

total.description: Total number of group assignments for this committee

userId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the user to assign as jury member

assignedAt.description: Optional assignment timestamp, defaults to current server time

userId.description: User ID of the jury member

email.description: Email address of the jury member

assignedByUserId.description: User ID of the coordinator who made this assignment

groupId.description: Identifier of the group to assign

assignedAt.description: Optional assignment timestamp, defaults to current server time

assignedByUserId.description: Coordinator ID who made this assignment

name.description: New display name of the committee

total.description: Total jury assignments for this committee

advisorId.description: User ID of the advisor to assign

assignmentSource.description: Whether the advisor is a primary advisor or additional jury member

assignedByUserId.description: User ID of the coordinator who made this assignment

groupId.description: ID of the group this advisor must grade

assignedAt.description: When the group was assigned to the committee

isOwnGroup.description: True if this group is directly advised by this advisor

originalAdvisorUserId.description: The primary advisor of this group; null when isOwnGroup is true

description.description: Revision instructions for the student team
description.example: Please upload a revised proposal with the missing risk analysis.

dueDatetime.description: ISO-8601 deadline for the requested revision

recipientUserId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the invite recipient user

groupId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the group to invite the user to

studentIds.description: Subset of student UUIDs to fetch; defaults to all group members

criteriaName.description: Descriptive name of the evaluation criteria

criteriaWeight.description: Weight as a decimal (0–1). Sum of all questions must = 1.0.

deliverableId.description: The deliverable this rubric evaluates (mutually exclusive with sprintEvaluationType)

sprintEvaluationType.description: Sprint evaluation type this rubric applies to (mutually exclusive with deliverableId)

name.description: Human-readable name for this rubric version

gradingType.description: Grading scale applied to all questions in this rubric

submissionId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the submission to review

committeeId.description: UUID of the committee assigned to the submission group

submissionId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the reviewed submission

grade.description: Numeric grade assigned by the reviewer

sprintId.description: Sprint ID — auto-generated if omitted. If provided, must exist in the Schedule API.

targetStoryPoints.description: Target story points for this sprint

isFinalized.description: True once the sprint has been finalized.

name.description: Friendly label derived from the linked Schedule date range.
